channel.title: Audio Plugin Guy - Deals Feed
channel.description: Las mejores ofertas de Audio Plugin Guy.

item.title: [HOT] Klevgrand|Get 39% off OneS 2 by Klevgrand. The discounted price is $119.99.?NEW
[HOT] Baby Audio|Get 38% off Grainferno by Baby Audio. The discounted price is $79.?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] fedDSP|FedDSP has released Morso distortion plugin for Win & Mac. The plugin is available as a free download
[HOT] UJAM|Get 50% off UJAM SELECT 10 Bundle by UJAM. The discounted price is $149
[HOT] UJAM|Get 55% off UJAM SELECT 5 Bundle by UJAM. The discounted price is $89
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Kobito|Kobito has released GrabTone synth plugin for Win & Mac. GrabTone is currently free. If the discount doesn’t apply automatically, use the code: GRABTONEPROMO100
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Lunacy|Lunacy Audio is offering CUBE Mini synth plugin for Mac & Win as a free download
[HOT] Softube|Softube Spring Sale – up to 75% off on select plugins
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Safari Pedals|Get the Gorilla Drive plugin by Safari Audio for free with the code: TWONOTES_WILDGORILLAS
[HOT] MeldaProduction|Get 55% off MStereoProcessor by MeldaProduction. The discounted price is $39
[SAVE BIG] Kirk Hunter Studios|Get 90% off Virtuoso Ensembles by Kirk Hunter Studios for $29.99 (Normally $299.99)
